titleStmt.title: SII 10.442: original edition by J. Ramayya Pantulu
No. 442. (A.R. No. 333 of 1915.) ON A BROKEN NANDI-PILLAR SET UP IN FRONT OF THE TEMPLE OF RĀMALINGASVĀMI, RĀVIPĀḌU, NARASARAOPETA TALUK, SAME DISTRICT. Ś. 1199. (Expired)

summary.p: States that Sāmanta Pōti-Nāyaka consecrated the image of Sūrēśvara in Rāvūru in the name of his father and for the merit of Kākatīya Rudradēva-Mahārāja, built a three-peaked temple and a maṇḍapa for it and endowed it with land and that he also presented a flower and fruit garden and a perpetual lamp to the temple. The inscribed stone is said to have been put up by Pōtinēḍu's sons Pōtaya and Māraya. Pōtinēḍu bears a long list of birudas among which are (1) an ornament of Durjayakula (2) the elevator (vardhana) of the Valaūṭla-vaṁśa, and (3) a lion to the mad elephant, that is Gajapati.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī
śubhasaka
varuṣaṁbu
lu 1199 gu
nēṁṭi bahu
dhānya saṁvva
tsara vaiśā
kha śuddha 3
guruvāra
munāṁḍu
śrīmanmahā
maṁḍalēśvara
kākatiyya ru
dradēvamahārā
julaku dharmmā
rttamugānu
śrīmatu mā
ṁddalasaka
lēśvara dēvadi
vyaśrīpāda
padmārādhaku lai
na śrīmatusā
maṁttapōtinā
yuṁḍu rāvū
ranu tamataṁḍri
pēra sūrēśvarama
hādēvaraṁ brati
ṣṭa sēsi trikūṭa
mu guḍlu maṁ
ḍḍapamūṁ gaṭṭi
ṁcce

śrīsū
rēśvaramahā
dēvuniki nivē
dyānakuṁ be
ṭṭina kṣētraṁ
kha 3 Anu
makoṁḍinā
ṁṭilōni vū
nuvu Anaḷla nī
runēla Idēva
rakuṁ beṭṭina
tōṁṭa Ūri
dakṣiṇamu
na Aṁdulō
ni vanamu
lu tāḍlu ci
ṁttalu māvi
ṁḍlu Ippalu
nimmalu mā
dīphalamulu
jādi nēvaṁtti
malle virijādi
karavīra guri
viṁdda ponna da
vana AnadiIpu
ṣpaphalabharita mai
na[U]dyānavana
mu Upakara
ṇamulu dēvara
kuṁ beṭṭi pōtinā
yuṁḍutama
rmmuvugānu

trikūṭamu
guḍlaku
Akhaṁḍadī
pānakuṁ be
ṭṭinamēṁka
lu 55 vīni
ṁ jēkoni nitya
māneṁḍu sama
ru mallebōI
ṁḍu naḍapuvā
ṁḍu Idivya
naḍupu malle
bōInikiṁ be
ṭṭiṁdi na 2 cēnu
dēvagānuvu
lu 4 Isthānapa
tiki dārajiyya
la manumaṁḍu
mārajiyya su
putruṁḍu māra
pōtajiyyalu
pōtināyunu
suputruṁḍu sū
rapanāyuṁ
ḍu tamapiturupi
tāmahulakuṁ
dharmmuvugāṁ be
ṭṭiṁccina śāsanamu .
svadattaṁ parada
ttaṁ vā yō pā
syati vasuṁdha
ra śaṣṭi rvvaruṣa
nahasrāṇāṁ vi
ṣṭāyāṁ jāya
tē krimi . śrī
cennaviśvanātha
śrīcaṁdra kaḷāva
taṁsa
tinādha .
tabōdhā . śrī
viśvēśvarāya
śivāya namaḥ
viśvanāthuniki (incomplete )

svasti sama
dhigatapaṁccamahā
sabda mahāma
hāsāmaṁtta
turagarēvaṁtta
vīralakṣmīkāṁtta
tinnidurjjaya
kulabhūṣaṇa
valaUṭlava
ṁśavarddhana gaṁ
ḍḍamārttaṁḍḍa
kaḍadabalagaṁ
ḍḍa kāṁccipu
rarakṣapāla
ka kaṭakacū
ṟakoṁḍa dharmma
pratipālaka
gōtrapavitra
praṇavāditya
gajapatimattamā
taṁgasiṁhya sāhasō
ttuṁgga śrīveṁggi
dēśacāḷukyapa
dāraviṁddamadhu
karāyamāna
mānakalabhūṣa
ṇa cāḷukyarā
jyapadavīmū
lastaṁbha Eladhā
yasiṁhya siṁ
hyasiṁhyapra
dī[?]śavallabhu laina
pōtinēni suputrulu
pōtayamārayalu
Ettiṁccina śāsanamu
Digital edition of SII 10.442 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
